Okay, so here's what we covered in this module. We started off talking about the two-step marketing process, talked about why we don't use a traditional lead magnet in the Six Figure Funnel formula, we then talked about the Six Figure Funnel formula lead magnet offer, the lead magnet offer page, the different lead magnet offer formulas for creating that page, and then we ended with some demos of some tools that you can use to build your lead magnet offer page. Here's what to do now. Number one, use the formulas to brainstorm headline ideas for your Six Figure Funnel formula lead magnet offer page, and remember, needs to be built on your hook and your promise. Two, choose the platform you're going to use, whether it's lead pages or 10 minute pages or another tool to create your lead magnet offer page. And then finally, of course, create your Six Figure Funnel formula lead magnet offer page.
